name: spatial-x-8d
description: SPATIAL X 8D — Personal 8D Audio Music Player

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix web" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && npm start --prefix electron"
scripts.build:mac: npm run build --prefix web && rm -rf electron/dist && cp -R web/dist electron/dist && npm run build --prefix electron
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix web && npm install --prefix electron
